current.en: Ben WL's Mexico light up the Azteca — a clinical 2-0 dumps Chris's Ecuador out and books El Tri a place in the last 16.

history.en: Tarang's France steamrolled James's Sweden 3-0 — no drama, no way back for the Swedes.
John's Norway snatch it late — a stoppage-time winner breaks Alex's Ivory Coast and roars into the last 16.

Penalty heartbreak all round: Martin's Paraguay buried Evie's Germany and Kate's Morocco dumped out Laura's Netherlands, both from the spot. Earlier, Joe's Brazil edged Emmy's Japan and Alex's Canada saw off Isaac's South Africa.
